case_title: RYAN GRIFFITH et al VS. MIDAS INTERNATIONAL CORPORATION et al

docket_entries.description: LETTER FILED FROM TBC GROUP RE WRONG ENTITY NAMED IN CONNECTION WITH MIDAS INT'L.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON AMENDED CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED APR-04-2013, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT ME CAL, INC.

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-13-2013 - CONTINUED PER STIPULATION OF ALL PARTIES TO OCT-21-2013 AT 6:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. "ME CAL, INC. HAS FILED A PETITION IN BANKRUPTCY. THEREFORE, THIS PROCEEDING IS STAYED TO OCTOBER 21, 2013 6:30PM FOR STATUS OF DEFENDANT'S PETITION. PLAINTIFFS' CLAIM AGAINST MIDAS INTERNATIONAL IS DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE", PER JUDGE MITCHELL. DEFENDANT WAS REPRESENTED BY JUAN HERNANDEZ--GENERAL MANAGER. APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES, EXCEPT DEFENDANT MIDAS INTERNATIONAL INC. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
DECLARATION OF NON-SERVICE & REQUEST FOR RESET OF COURT DATE. FILED BY PLAINTIFF GRIFFITH, RYAN
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FILED BY PLAINTIFF GRIFFITH, RYAN O'BLENNIS, KELLY AS TO DEFENDANT HERNANDEZ, JUAN
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL *AGENT: CSC-LAWYERS INCORPORATING SERVICE FILED BY PLAINTIFF GRIFFITH, RYAN O'BLENNIS, KELLY AS TO DEFENDANT MIDAS INTERNATIONAL CORPORATION
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL *THOMAS BINDLEY-PRESIDENT* FILED BY PLAINTIFF GRIFFITH, RYAN O'BLENNIS, KELLY AS TO DEFENDANT MIDAS INTERNATIONAL CORPORATION
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON AMENDED CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED JAN-22-2013, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT MIDAS INTERNATIONAL CORPORATION
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT ME CAL, INC.
RETURNED MAIL: CONTINUE ORDER AMILED TO MIDAS INTERNATIONAL CORP RETURNED = RETURN TO SENDER, NOT DELIVERABLE AS ADDRESSED, UNABLE TO FORWARD

DECLARATION OF AMENDING CLAIM TO CORRECT DEFENDANT'S NAME FROM MIDAS AUTO REPAIR SERVICE TO MIDAS INTERNATIONAL CORPORATION AND ADDRESS CHANGE; ALSO DISMISS THE SECOND DEFENDANT, JUAN HERNANDEZ. FILED BY PLAINTIFF GRIFFITH, RYAN O'BLENNIS, KELLY
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL *AGENT FOR SERVICE: CORPORATING SERVICE COMPANY FILED BY PLAINTIFF GRIFFITH, RYAN O'BLENNIS, KELLY AS TO DEFENDANT MIDAS INTERNATIONAL CORPORATION
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON AMENDED CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF **CSC-LAWYERS INC - SACRAMENTO, CA** SERVED JAN-16-2013, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT MIDAS INTERNATIONAL CORPORATION
DECLARATION OF AMENDING CLAIM TO ADD ANOTHER DEFENDANT - ME CAL, INC. FILED BY PLAINTIFF GRIFFITH, RYAN O'BLENNIS, KELLY
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF GRIFFITH, RYAN AS TO DEFENDANT ME CAL, INC.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON AMENDED CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED APR-04-2013, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT MIDAS INTERNATIONAL CORPORATION

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-21-2013 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF TO FEB-24-2014 AT 6:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. "DEFENDANT, ME CAL INC. HAS FILED A CHAPTER 7 BANKRUPTCY--THEREFORE, THIS PROCEEDING CONTINUES TO BE STAYED. PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM AGAINST JUAN HERNANDEZ IS DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO PROOF OF SERVICE', PER JUDGE MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF, ONLY. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-24-2014 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF TO DEC-15-2014 AT 6:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. DEFENDANT, ME CAL INC. HAS FILED A CHAPTER 7 BANKRUPTCY--THEREFORE, THIS PROCEEDING CONTINUES TO BE STAYED. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF, ONLY, EXCEPT PLAINTIFF KELLY O'BLENNIS WHO WAS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS ORDER OF DISMISSAL MAIL RETURNED: NOT DELIVERABLE AS ADDRESSED UNABLE TO FORWARD
REMARK: FILE IS DESTROYED PURSUANT TO GOVERNMENT CODE SECTION 68153. ORDER SIGNED AND FILED ON 10/14/2025.
TRIAL RESET TO FEB-25-2013 AT 06:30 PM IN DEPT 506 TRIAL OF JAN-17-2013 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED ON 01/22/13, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED ON DEFENDANT MIDAS INTERNATIONAL CORPORATION.
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF GRIFFITH, RYAN AS TO DEFENDANT MIDAS INTERNATIONAL CORPORATION
CORRESPONDENCE RECEIVED FILED BY DEFENDANT MIDAS INTERNATIONAL CORPORATION
CASE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE AS TO MIDAS INTERNATIONAL CORPORATION BY COURT AT SMALL CLAIM HEARING OF MAY-13-2013 AT 6:30 PM.
RETURN MAIL - SMALL CLAIMS CONTINUE ORDER - SENT TO ME CAL. INC.

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-15-2014 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF TO DEC-14-2015 AT 6:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. DEFENDANT, ME CAL INC. HAS FILED A CHAPTER 7 BANKRUPTCY--THEREFORE, THIS PROCEEDING CONTINUES TO BE STAYED. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF, ONLY, EXCEPT PLAINTIFF KELLY O'BLENNIS WHO WAS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
AMENDED MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,235.00 (2ND AMENDED) FILED BY GRIFFITH, RYAN O'BLENNIS, KELLY AS TO DEFENDANT MIDAS INTERNATIONAL CORPORATION HERNANDEZ, JUAN ME CAL, INC.

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. PLAINTIFF WAS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANTS (2) WERE NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (D-506)

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,235.00 FILED BY GRIFFITH, RYAN O'BLENNIS, KELLY AS TO DEFENDANT MIDAS INTERNATIONAL CORPORATION HERNANDEZ, JUAN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-17-2013 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
AMENDED MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,235.00 FILED BY GRIFFITH, RYAN O'BLENNIS, KELLY AS TO DEFENDANT MIDAS INTERNATIONAL CORPORATION

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-25-2013 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE ON BOTH DEFENDANTS TO MAY-13-2013 AT 6:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. NO PROOF OF SERVICE ON THE 2ND AMENDED CLAIM.NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
CASE DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE AS TO JUAN HERNANDEZ BY COURT AT SMALL CLAIM HEARING OF OCT-21-2013 AT 6:30 PM. NO PROOF OF SERVICE.
